commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b968e89cfb07f7a12210e13b039fe06029d2ef74)
commands.review_summary:
The PR reorders the release publish workflow so postpublish verification runs before GitHub release/proof creation, adds a `--skip-github-release` verifier mode, adds an incomplete-public-release guard, and updates release-maintainer skill guidance.

PR surface: Tests +12, Docs +14, Config +33, Other +9. Total +68 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: on the PR head, the workflow verifies before creating the GitHub release, while `docs/reference/RELEASING.md` still documents the old release-page-before-verification order. I did not run the workflow because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The docs mismatch is concrete, but the draft maintainer release workflow change also needs release-owner judgment about the new retry semantics before merge.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
